description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a skeletonized thumbhole stock, providing ergonomic support and reduced weight. The body is primarily composed of a matte-finished metal receiver and barrel, with a polymer or composite stock in a muted olive or tan color. The barrel is long and slender, likely optimized for precision shooting, and is fitted with a prominent muzzle device at the tip. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the rifle appears to have a top-mounted rail for optics, though no sight is currently attached. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban or field deployment. The finish is smooth and hard, with minimal surface texture and a utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern, skeletonized thumbhole rifle with a long barrel, detachable box magazine, and matte olive/tan polymer stock. The design is sleek, durable, and optimized for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the skeletonized thumbhole stock, long barrel, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle device and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock cutouts.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the thumbhole opening, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
